name: Sweet Milk Waffles I
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Melted Butter or Butter Substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder together.
2. Beat egg yolks until light and foamy.
3. Add sugar and melted butter to the egg yolks. Mix well.
4. Gradually add milk to the egg mixture, alternating with the sifted dry ingredients.
5. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Cook the batter in a hot waffle iron.
7. Serve 6 servings.
